findings.blocker: Scheme.GlueData needs the t' triple-overlap DATA field; a sorry in any data field ships a junk scheme (banned). Bottom data layer (U/V/f/t + open-immersion + transition gate) built; t'/t_fac/cocycle/f_id/t_id remain.

attempts.strategy: grassFrame_minor_self: prove (grassFrame I).submatrix id ⇑I = 1 by ext over MvPolynomial matrix
attempts.code_tried: ext p s; rw [Matrix.submatrix_apply, Matrix.one_apply]; show grassFrame r d I p (I s) = _; unfold grassFrame
attempts.lean_error: 'show' tactic failed, pattern ... not definitionally equal; ext over-recurses into MvPolynomial.coeff
attempts.insight: ext recurses into MvPolynomial.coeff on poly-valued matrices; use `refine Matrix.ext fun p s => ?_` and `change` not `show`.

attempts.code_tried: refine Matrix.ext fun p s => ?_; rw [Matrix.submatrix_apply, Matrix.one_apply]; change grassFrame r d I p (I s) = _; unfold grassFrame
attempts.insight: `change` over `show` avoids the readability warning and matches defeq.

attempts.code_tried: rw [grassMinorMatrixLoc, grassFrameLoc, Matrix.submatrix_map, grassMinor, ← RingHom.map_det]; rfl
attempts.lean_error: Failed to rewrite using equation theorems for `grassMinor`
attempts.insight: plain `def`s have no rw equation lemmas; use `unfold` / `simp only [theDef]` / `show … from rfl`.

attempts.code_tried: unfold grassMinorMatrixLoc grassFrameLoc grassMinor; rw [Matrix.submatrix_map]; exact (RingHom.map_det _ _).symm
attempts.insight: unfold exposes def bodies where rw cannot.

attempts.strategy: grassTransAux_mapMatrix_frame using RingHom.mapMatrix on the d×r frame
attempts.code_tried: (grassTransAux r d I J).mapMatrix (grassFrame r d J) = grassTransMatrix r d I J
attempts.lean_error: Type mismatch: grassTransMatrix has type Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) _ but mapMatrix expects square Matrix ?m ?m
attempts.insight: RingHom.mapMatrix is SQUARE-only (matrices form a ring only when square); for the non-square Fin d × Fin r frame use plain entrywise Matrix.map. Renamed lemma → grassTransAux_map_frame.

attempts.strategy: grassTransAux_map_frame via Matrix.map + case split on identity vs free columns
attempts.code_tried: refine Matrix.ext fun p q => ?_; rw [Matrix.map_apply]; by_cases hq : ∃ s, J s = q; (identity col via grassTransMatrix_submatrix_self) / (free col: unfold grassTransAux grassFrame; rw [dif_neg hq, MvPolynomial.eval₂Hom_X'])
attempts.lean_error: intermediate: unsolved `grassTransMatrix (id p) q = grassTransMatrix p q`; proof-irrelevant `X ⟨q,a⟩ = X ⟨q,b⟩` not auto-closed by simp only [grassFrame, dif_neg]
attempts.insight: Sidestep proof-irrelevant subtype mismatch by NOT asserting the subtype proof: `unfold grassTransAux grassFrame; rw [dif_neg hq, eval₂Hom_X']` carries the proof symbolically and closes by defeq.

attempts.strategy: grassTransAux_minor_isUnit gate: θ(P^J_I) is a unit
attempts.insight: Closed the single hardest algebraic obstacle — transition-map well-definedness; lets grassTransMorphism (GlueData t) be a real morphism via Localization.awayLift.

attempts.strategy: open Classical in before grassFrame def
attempts.code_tried:
open Classical in
noncomputable def grassFrame ...
attempts.lean_error: unexpected token 'open'; expected 'lemma' (cannot sit between doc-comment and def)
attempts.insight: Not needed: Decidable (∃ s, I s = q) resolves via the Fintype instance; removed the open.

next_steps: Finish grassmannianScheme := D.glued: f_id (P^I_I=1 ⟹ localization away from unit is iso), t_id (grassTransMatrix I I = X^I ⟹ grassTrans I I = id), and build t' triple-overlap morphism + discharge t_fac/cocycle entrywise from already-proven grassmannian_cocycle. f_hasPullback automatic (open immersions).
